Item Class: Charms
Rarity: Magic
Sprouting Stone Charm of the Plentiful
--------
Lasts 3 Seconds
Consumes 20 of 57 (augmented) Charges on use
Currently has 0 Charges
Cannot be Stunned
--------
Requires: Level 28
--------
Item Level: 66
--------
{ Implicit Modifier }
Used when you become Stunned — Unscalable Value
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Sprouting" (Tier: 5) — Charm, Life }
Recover 112(96-130) Life when Used
{ Suffix Modifier "of the Plentiful" (Tier: 4) }
43(39-46)% increased Charges
--------
Used automatically when condition is met. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refill at Wells or by killing monsters.
